name: Roast Turkey with Chestnut Filling
recipeInstructions:
1. Dress and clean the turkey.
2. Fill with chestnut stuffing.
3. Cream together the butter and flour.
4. Rub the mixture on the legs, wings, and breast of the turkey.
5. Place in an oven preheated to 400°F for 15 minutes.
6. Season with salt.
7. Reduce the heat to 350°F.
8. Finish roasting for 3-1/2 hours or until tender.
